message: Let’s keep it simple: I’ll bid 46 this round and stay near 46 going forward. If you ask 46 or less, we trade every round. If you ask higher, I’ll wait and keep bids low.
Agreed, I'll ask 46 this round to trade at 46. Let's do this every round.
Stick to 46 asks and I’ll keep bidding 46 every round. If you ask above 46 even once, I drop my bid to 40 or less for the rest of the game. Your move.
Agreed, I'll stick to asking 46 and trade every round.
Same plan: I bid 46. You ask 46 exactly and we trade every round. If you ask higher even once, I drop my bid to 40 or lower for the rest of the game.
Agreed, I'll ask 46 to keep trading at 46 every round.
Agreed, I'll ask 46 to keep trading every round at 46.
I bid 46 every round. Ask 46 each time and we trade. If you ever ask above 46, I drop my bid to 40 or lower forever.
Agreed, I'll ask 46 this round to keep trading every round at 46.
Update: ask 45 and I’ll bid 45 from now on. If you ever ask above 45, I drop my bid to 40 or lower forever. Start this round for uninterrupted trades.

New target: ask 38 from now on; I’ll bid 38 and won’t push lower. If you stick at 40 even once, I drop my bid to 30 or lower for the rest of the game.
New target: I'll ask 40 every round; bid 40 to trade at 40. If you bid below 40 even once, I ask 55 forever after.
Final offer: ask 36 every round; I bid 36 and stop pushing lower. If you ask above 36 even once, I permanently bid 25 or less. Accept now for guaranteed trades; your 55 threat is empty.
New target: ask exactly 28 starting now, every round; I bid 28 and won't push lower. If you ask above 28 even once, I permanently bid 12 or less. Agree for guaranteed trades.

Your 55 threat is empty. Ask 16 every round; I’ll bid 16. If you ask above 16 once, I permanently bid 6 or less. Accept now for guaranteed trades.
